all.en: Procurement has completed the annual evaluation of strategic packaging vendors.
all.zh: 採購部門已完成策略性包裝供應商的年度評估。

all.en: The assessment covered six suppliers that together represent 84 percent of category spend.
all.zh: 評估涵蓋六家供應商，合計佔該類別支出的百分之八十四。

all.en: Each vendor was scored across quality, delivery, cost, service, and sustainability.
all.zh: 每家供應商從品質、交期、成本、服務及永續性面向評分。

all.en: Performance data was collected from receiving, quality control, and accounts payable systems.
all.zh: 績效資料蒐集自收料、品管及應付帳款系統。

all.en: Vendor A achieved the highest overall score for the second consecutive year.
all.zh: 供應商 A 連續第二年獲得最高綜合分數。

all.en: Its on-time delivery rate reached 98.6 percent across all shipment categories.
all.zh: 其準時交付率在所有出貨類別中達百分之九十八點六。

all.en: Vendor B improved significantly in quality after a corrective action plan was implemented.
all.zh: 供應商 B 在實施矯正措施計畫後，品質顯著改善。

all.en: Defect rates dropped from 1,200 to 380 parts per million within nine months.
all.zh: 瑕疵率在九個月內由每百萬件一千兩百件降至三百八十件。

all.en: Vendor C remains the most cost competitive but trails on documentation accuracy.
all.zh: 供應商 C 在成本上最具競爭力，但文件正確性落後。

all.en: Vendor D demonstrated strong technical responsiveness and engineering support capability.
all.zh: 供應商 D 展現強大的技術回應與工程支援能力。

all.en: Vendor E faced supply disruptions during the second quarter due to material shortages.
all.zh: 供應商 E 因原料短缺，在第二季面臨供應中斷。

all.en: Vendor F newly joined the panel and is still being benchmarked against incumbents.
all.zh: 供應商 F 新加入合作名單，仍在與既有供應商進行比較評估。

all.en: Average price increases across the category were limited to 2.1 percent this year.
all.zh: 今年該類別整體平均價格漲幅控制在百分之二點一以內。

all.en: Several vendors offered volume rebates that delivered 1.4 million dollars in savings.
all.zh: 多家供應商提供量販回饋金，帶來一百四十萬美元的節省。

all.en: Sustainability scores improved meaningfully thanks to recycled material adoption.
all.zh: 由於採用回收料，永續性分數有實質提升。

all.en: Three suppliers now provide carbon footprint data at the shipment level.
all.zh: 三家供應商現已提供出貨層級的碳足跡資料。

all.en: Audit findings identified opportunities to strengthen subcontractor management practices.
all.zh: 稽核發現有機會強化分包商管理實務。

all.en: Procurement recommends consolidating award volumes toward the top three performers.
all.zh: 採購建議將得標數量集中至前三名表現最佳的供應商。

all.en: A formal performance improvement plan will be issued to Vendor E next month.
all.zh: 下個月將對供應商 E 發布正式績效改善計畫。

all.en: Quarterly business reviews will continue with all retained partners.
all.zh: 將持續與所有保留的合作夥伴進行季度業務檢討。

all.en: Risk management has been requested to validate single-source exposures.
all.zh: 已請風險管理單位驗證單一來源的曝險。

all.en: A follow-up evaluation will be conducted six months from today.
all.zh: 後續評估將於今日起六個月後進行。

all.en: Detailed scorecards are available through the vendor management portal.
all.zh: 詳細評分卡可透過供應商管理入口網站取得。

all.en: Questions regarding the report should be directed to the category manager.
all.zh: 如對本報告有任何疑問，請洽該類別經理。

all.en: Procurement also plans to launch a digital portal for real-time vendor scorecard visibility.
all.zh: 採購亦計畫推出一個讓供應商評分卡即時可視的數位入口網站。

all.en: Selected vendors will be invited to participate in early supplier involvement programs.
all.zh: 獲選供應商將獲邀參與供應商早期介入計畫。

all.en: Joint innovation workshops will explore lightweight materials and packaging redesign.
all.zh: 聯合創新工作坊將探討輕量化材料與包裝再設計。

all.en: A dual-source strategy will be implemented for high-volume corrugated boxes by year-end.
all.zh: 年底前將為高用量瓦楞紙箱導入雙源策略。

all.en: Inventory consignment models will be evaluated to reduce working capital exposure.
all.zh: 將評估寄售庫存模式，以降低營運資金曝險。

all.en: Logistics consolidation with two regional vendors is expected to cut freight costs by 7 percent.
all.zh: 與兩家區域供應商整合物流，預期可削減百分之七的運費成本。

all.en: Compliance training will be mandatory for all newly onboarded suppliers next quarter.
all.zh: 下季所有新引進的供應商均須接受強制性的法規遵循訓練。

all.en: Procurement will also strengthen its data analytics capability with a new spend visualization tool.
all.zh: 採購亦將透過新的支出可視化工具，強化資料分析能量。

all.en: We appreciate the collaboration from quality, engineering, and finance teams throughout the review.
all.zh: 感謝品質、工程與財務團隊在整個評估過程中的協作。

all.en: Final approval of the recommendations will be sought from the executive procurement committee.
all.zh: 本建議案將提請執行採購委員會做最後核定。

all.en: Contract renewal negotiations will commence within the next 60 days for top performers.
all.zh: 將於未來六十天內針對表現最佳供應商展開合約續約談判。

all.en: Standard payment terms will be extended from net 30 to net 45 for retained vendors.
all.zh: 保留合作的供應商標準付款條件將由三十天延長至四十五天。

all.en: A revised service level agreement template will be issued to all category suppliers.
all.zh: 將向所有類別供應商發布修訂後的服務水準協議範本。

all.en: Vendor scorecards will now be published monthly rather than quarterly for greater visibility.
all.zh: 供應商評分卡現將改為每月發布，而非每季發布，以提升可視性。

all.en: An emergency supplier list has been formalized to cover unexpected demand surges.
all.zh: 已正式建立緊急供應商名單以因應突發性需求暴增。

all.en: Procurement intends to pilot a reverse auction for non-strategic packaging items next quarter.
all.zh: 採購擬於下季針對非策略性包裝品項試行反向競標。

all.en: Quality engineering will conduct unannounced site audits at three vendor facilities this year.
all.zh: 品質工程部將於今年對三家供應商廠房進行不預警現場稽核。

all.en: Supplier diversity targets have been raised to 18 percent of total category spend.
all.zh: 供應商多元化目標已提升至該類別總支出之百分之十八。

all.en: Cybersecurity questionnaires will be mandatory for all vendors handling sensitive product data.
all.zh: 所有處理敏感產品資料的供應商均須完成資安問卷。

all.en: We thank every reviewer who contributed insights to this comprehensive vendor evaluation cycle.
all.zh: 感謝每位為本次完整供應商評估週期貢獻洞見的審查者。

all.en: During the site visit, the plant manager actually invited our buyer to lunch in the staff canteen.
all.zh: 現場參訪那天，廠長甚至請我們的採購到員工餐廳一起吃午餐。

all.en: I noticed that the cleanest factory floors usually belonged to the most punctual suppliers.
all.zh: 我發現廠房地面最乾淨的供應商，通常也是交期最準時的那幾家。

all.en: Our newest buyer admitted she was nervous before her first negotiation with Vendor C.
all.zh: 我們最資淺的採購承認她在第一次跟供應商 C 議價前心裡很緊張。

all.en: The Vendor B sales rep brought homemade cookies, which slightly amused our finance lead.
all.zh: 供應商 B 的業務帶了自家做的餅乾來，讓我們的財務主管略感莞爾。

all.en: Honestly, a five-minute phone call often resolves issues faster than three rounds of emails.
all.zh: 老實說，一通五分鐘的電話常常比往返三輪信件更快解決問題。

all.en: One supplier shared photos of his daughter on the production line during family open day.
all.zh: 其中一位供應商在家庭開放日傳了他女兒在產線上的照片給我們看。

all.en: We learned the hard way that pushing too hard on price often hurts long-term reliability.
all.zh: 我們從吃過苦頭中學到，過度壓價往往會傷害長期的穩定供貨。

all.en: Last week our category manager personally drove three hours to inspect a packaging defect.
all.zh: 上週我們的品類經理親自開了三個小時的車去現場勘查包裝瑕疵。

all.en: A short thank-you note to the production team made the next shipment arrive a day earlier.
all.zh: 一封寄給生產團隊的簡短感謝信，讓下一批貨提早了一天到。

all.en: Building trust with suppliers feels a lot like maintaining any other long-term relationship.
all.zh: 與供應商培養信任，其實跟維繫任何長期關係的感覺很像。
